description: Care Management Agent (CareMgmtAgent) for the CareMgmt, PopHealth persona(s). Bound to PayerAnalytics semantic model (Direct Lake over lh_gold_curated) and the Payer_Ontology graph. Allowed gold tables: fact_claim, fact_member_month, fact_quality_event, fact_rx_claim, dim_member, dim_lob, dim_date.
